message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[{\"user_id\": \"u1\", \"operation\": \"insert\", \"data\": \"segment_1:alpha\"}, {\"user_id\": \"u2\", \"operation\": \"insert\", \"data\": \"segment_1:alphabet\"}, {\"user_id\": \"u3\", \"operation\": \"delete\", \"data\": \"segment_1:beta\"}, {\"user_id\": \"u4\", \"operation\": \"merge_offline\", \"data\": \"segment_1:alpha_offline\"}, {\"user_id\": \"u5\", \"operation\": \"insert\", \"data\": \"segment_2:beta\"}, {\"user_id\": \"u6\", \"operation\": \"merge_offline\", \"data\": \"segment_1:alphabet\"}, {\"user_id\": \"u7\", \"operation\": \"search\", \"data\": \"segment_1:al\"}]"], "focus":"merge_offline with duplicate and non-existent delete; preserves all versions and determinism for segment_1"}, {"input_lines":["[{\"user_id\": \"a\", \"operation\": \"insert\", \"data\": \"segment_4:one\"}, {\"user_id\": \"b\", \"operation\": \"insert\", \"data\": \"segment_4:two\"}, {\"user_id\": \"c\", \"operation\": \"insert\", \"data\": \"segment_4:three\"}, {\"user_id\": \"d\", \"operation\": \"delete\", \"data\": \"segment_4:two\"}, {\"user_id\": \"e\", \"operation\": \"insert\", \"data\": \"segment_4:\"}, {\"user_id\": \"f\", \"operation\": \"search\", \"data\": \"segment_4:\"}]"], "focus":"empty-content insert and empty-prefix search returning all remaining entries in the segment"}, {"input_lines":["[{\"user_id\": \"x1\", \"operation\": \"insert\", \"data\": \"segment_1:prelude\"}, {\"user_id\": \"x2\", \"operation\": \"insert\", \"data\": \"segment_10:prelude\"}, {\"user_id\": \"x3\", \"operation\": \"insert\", \"data\": \"segment_10:prevent\"}, {\"user_id\": \"x4\", \"operation\": \"insert\", \"data\": \"segment_100:preemption\"}, {\"user_id\": \"x5\", \"operation\": \"merge_offline\", \"data\": \"segment_10:preventive\"}, {\"user_id\": \"x6\", \"operation\": \"delete\", \"data\": \"segment_1:prelude\"}, {\"user_id\": \"x7\", \"operation\": \"insert\", \"data\": \"segment_10:http:example.com\"}, {\"user_id\": \"x8\", \"operation\": \"search\", \"data\": \"segment_10:pre\"}]"], "focus":"segment id edge cases (segment_1 vs segment_10 vs segment_100) and content containing colons to test robust parsing and isolation"}]}
